SUMMARY:
It enables us to take a holistic and informed approach to decision-making and continuously refine our strategies to achieve our desired goals.

URL: https://savory.global/introduction-to-holistic-decision-making/

SUMMARY:
Learn to manage complexity with the Holistic Management framework, including defining your Whole Under Management, writing a Holistic Context,

--- SOURCE 3: Holistic Decision Making ---
URL: https://savoursoilpermaculture.com/holistic-decision-making/

SUMMARY:
Holistic decision-making is a comprehensive approach that transcends linear and reductionist methods. It involves understanding the entire system.



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


--- SOURCE 4: A method of strategic planning that prioritizes holistic thinking ---
URL: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/379727464_A_method_of_strategic_planning_that_prioritizes_holistic_thinking

SUMMARY:
This abstract introduces a strategic planning approach that underscores the significance of holistic thinking in decision-making processes.



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


--- SOURCE 5: Holistic Approach in Business: Definition, Characteristics ... ---
URL: https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/career-development/holistic-approach-in-business

SUMMARY:
A holistic business approach is a strategy that connects every department in an organization to help them work as one team.



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

enriched_points.expanded_content: Integrating diverse factors and perspectives enhances strategic decision-making, fostering collaboration across departments to address complex issues effectively.
Utilizing holistic frameworks enables more accurate forecasting by considering interdependencies within systems, leading to informed and resilient decision-making.
A holistic approach builds adaptability in organizations, equipping them to respond effectively to unforeseen challenges while maintaining strategic alignment.
